boss.effect: Base Chips and Mult are halved
boss.name: The Flint

small.name: Small Blind
small.tag_effect: Gives $1 per unused discard this run (Will give $28)

value.effect: Played cards with even rank give +4 Mult when scored (10, 8, 6, 4, 2)
+8 Mult if played hand contains a Pair
Adds the number of times poker hand has been played this run to Mult
